name: ChangeCardDetails
description: Customer wants to update the bank account or card details used for their Virgin Media payments — such as a new card number, new expiry date, new bank account, or new sort code. This is about changing the details on an existing payment method, not setting up a new payment method, changing when payment is taken, or making an immediate payment.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I need to update my {paymentMethod} details
Can I change the {paymentMethod} used for my payments?
How do I update my {paymentMethod} on my account?
My {paymentMethod} has expired and I need to add the new one
I've got a new {paymentMethod} and need to update my payment details
Change my {paymentMethod} details please
I've changed bank and need to update my direct debit details
My {paymentMethod} number has changed — how do I update it?
Where do I update my {paymentMethod} details in the app?
I'm trying to update my {paymentMethod} online but it won't let me
I want to replace the {paymentMethod} on my account with a new one
My bank sent me a replacement {paymentMethod} and the details are different
Can you update the sort code and account number for my direct debit?
The {paymentMethod} on file is out of date
I need to put a different {paymentMethod} on my account for payments
My payment failed because the {paymentMethod} details are wrong — can I update them?
How do I change the card you take my payment from?
I want to amend my bank details for my direct debit
Update my {paymentMethod}
change card details
